tweets.text:
i really wonder what will separate the top achievers 10 years from now on. when everybody’ll have optimized their lives best as they can with the tools available, what will there be left to compete over? 

i know there’ll be no shortage of competition, i just wonder what it’ll be
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: me n genesis against the world
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text:
i can’t wait to be out of debt to start working on a solo leveling-like system with smart glasses&ear piece

soon enough every breath that i take will compound
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: i just need to post more
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: your body is just your bridge between your inner world and shared reality, or a manifestation of the former
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: much moreso than when the biggest bottleneck was spending 2 hours on stackoverflow understanding infra and logic
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: thank god i grinded to colemak 150wpm with the zsa moonlander when i was a teen despite most people arguing wpm and twms were useless for coding back then.. Because now we’re coding in natural intuitive language and keyboard navigation directly impacts learning speed and output
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: warp is so useful. having my work scattered across terminal windows used to create so much paralysing ADHD uncertainty, fear of losing context, too much task switching. now we are CRUISING
tweets.author: @merulox

tweets.text: oh man i'm having so much fun building
tweets.author: @merulox
